@siteping/widget 0.9.15  (MIT — NeosiaNexus/SitePing)
Vendored file: siteping.global.js  (dist/index.global.js, IIFE global build)
Exposes: window.SitePing.initSiteping(config)
Self-contained: no dynamic imports / no split chunks.

NOTE: the trailing `//# sourceMappingURL=index.global.js.map` COMMENT was removed
(the .map is not vendored) so WhiteNoise's manifest post-processing doesn't fail.
Strip only the comment substring — NOT the whole line: the sourcemap comment shares
its line with `exports.initSiteping=Wf;return exports;})({})`, so a line-delete breaks
the bundle (unterminated license comment, no initSiteping export).
